name: sovereign-api-tester-mcp
description: MCP server for API testing — make HTTP requests, test endpoints, generate cURL commands, create mock responses, health checks. Postman in your IDE.

tools.name: http_request
tools.description: Make an HTTP request (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, PATCH) with custom headers and body. Returns status, timing, response headers, and body.

tools.name: test_endpoint
tools.description: Test an API endpoint with expected status code validation and optional JSON field checks. Shows PASS/FAIL for each check.

tools.name: generate_curl
tools.description: Generate a cURL command from method, URL, headers, and body parameters.

tools.name: mock_response
tools.description: Generate realistic mock JSON responses for API prototyping. Supports resource types: user, product, order, post, comment.

tools.name: api_health_check
tools.description: Check health of multiple API endpoints simultaneously. Shows UP/DOWN status table with response times.
